prerequisites.label: Skill 07 — Kie Setup
prerequisites.satisfy: Run the Skill 07 installer: bash $OC_ROOT/skills/07-kie-setup/install.sh. Skill 07 provides credentials for image generation via Kie.ai endpoints (GPT-Image 2, Nano Banana 2, Seedream 4.5, Ideogram V3, Wan 2.7), required for all DIU image generation, photo shoot and deck-imagery work.

prerequisites.label: Kie.ai API Key
prerequisites.satisfy: Add KIE_API_KEY=<your key> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env (chmod 600), then: openclaw config set env.vars.KIE_API_KEY "$KIE_API_KEY". Get your API key from app.kie.ai > Settings > API Keys.

prerequisites.label: python3 runtime
prerequisites.satisfy: Install python3 (Mac: it ships with the Command Line Tools, or `brew install python`; Debian/Ubuntu container: `apt-get install -y python3`). Every coded gate in this skill — scripts/diu_validator.py route-check, prompt-caps and consent-check — is python3, and qc-design-intelligence-library.sh fails hard without it rather than certifying PASS untested.
